traits.locale_text:
Using stimulators inflicts {uip|ToxinDrug|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955} levels of toxin, and the user immediately suffers an instance of damage from this effect.
As long as the user has {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, they cannot use stimulators and suffer {uip|ToxinTrauma|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955} levels of toxin at the start of each turn.

Using stimulators inflicts {uip|ToxinDrug|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955} levels of toxin, and the user immediately suffers an instance of damage from this effect.
As long as the user has {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, they cannot use stimulators and suffer {uip|ToxinTrauma|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955} levels of toxin at the start of each turn.
The number of the user's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks is increased by +3.
The number of the user's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks is increased by +3.

Using stimulants inflicts +{uip|ToxinDrug|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}, and the user immediately suffers an instance of {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from this effect.
As long as the user has {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, they cannot use stimulants and suffer +{uip|ToxinTrauma|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955} levels of toxin at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.original_text: The user gains +3 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Использование стимуляторов накладывает уровни {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравления{/g} (+{uip|ToxinDrug|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955}), и обладатель аугмента немедленно получает внеочередной {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} от этого эффекта.
Пока у обладателя аугмента {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломаны ребра{/g}, он не может использовать стимуляторы и получает отравление (+{uip|ToxinTrauma|564498e23d69484b9d5b9e3ac2369955}) в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.
